responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix the IVX project media mixing (Perez Residence showing Casa Rosario images), restore landing reels, and create one canonical project data source across Supabase, backend API, native app, and public landing page — while the prior IVX IA deployment gate fix remains code-complete but undeployed.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public)
- Backend live at `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- Public landing live at `https://ivxholding.com` (S3 bucket `ivxholding.com`, deployed via `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` using AWS credentials)
- Supabase: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`, anon key `eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzMxOTQwMjcsImV4cCI6MjA4ODc3MDAyN30.OLDwa21VHQNs151AD-8k--_HigQ2d-N7yJfFn5UeNPk`
- **IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER STANDARD**: every completed task must include 12-point evidence; no placeholders, no narrative templates, no success claims without real tool execution evidence
- Deployment state machine required: REQUESTED→CODE_CHANGED→TYPECHECK_PASSED→TESTS_PASSED→COMMITTED→PUSHED→DEPLOY_TRIGGERED→DEPLOY_SUCCEEDED→PRODUCTION_VERIFIED
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key — only Vercel access
- Workspace project ID `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` is Swift — cannot preview React Native app from sandbox
- User demands real production evidence (screenshots, API responses, commit SHAs, deployment IDs); any missing proof must be marked UNVERIFIED

## Progress
### Done
- **IVX IA gate fix — code complete, locally verified (NOT deployed)**:
  - Gate test suite: 23/23 PASS; backend test suite: 812/812 PASS; TypeScript: 0 backend errors
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` — NEW gate: blocks placeholders unconditionally, blocks DEPLOYED/LIVE/VERIFIED claims without evidence
  - `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` — gate wired at line 567 in `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` (all 26 answer paths)
  - `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` — placeholder rejection added
  - `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` — 8 forbidden markers added
- **Prior production state**: commit `d35db8b9` live on Render (HTTP 200, `/version` + `/health` confirmed); gate fix NOT deployed
- **Phase 1 audit COMPLETE — root cause identified**:
  - `jv_deals` table uses TEXT ids: `perez-residence-001`, `casa-rosario-001`, `JV-202603-5190`
  - `project_media` table uses UUID `project_id` — ALL 14 rows are orphans (5 with test UUID `a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890`, 9 with `fe407c4b-0807-43ec-8976-e89d30435f46`); none reference real jv_deals
  - `project_videos` table exists (NOT `project_reels`); all rows have `project_id = self.id` (self-referencing orphans); all `is_approved=false`
  - No `jv_deal_media` or `jv_deal_reels` tables exist yet
  - Frontend compensated with hardcoded fallback arrays where `PEREZ_RESIDENCE_PHOTOS` contained Casa Rosario's R2 URLs (`junpisw15h6borglpbckz`, `2s8bcg6npyx96xcfrr5rm`, `t8rc86kynbs64jopcujtf`, `bxqj57n0z60oqoxaqvnlo`)
  - Landing page had 4 duplicate copies of fallback arrays (lines ~6309, ~9183, ~12056, ~14930)
  - Hardcoded `ownership_text` values (0.0020%, 0.0036%, 0.0125%) in landing didn't match dynamic calculation from app
  - Perez `propertyValue` was 2500000 in landing but `estimated_value` is 3125000 in DB
  - Casa Rosario had `display_order=1` (same as Perez) — duplicate; anon-key PATCH attempt returned empty (RLS blocked)
  - IVX Jacksonville had embedded base64 data-URI photo in `photos` JSONB
- **Phase 2-5 code changes MADE (not yet tested/deployed)**:
  - `expo/constants/deal-photos.ts` — PEREZ_RESIDENCE_PHOTOS replaced with 8 correct Supabase storage URLs from `deal-photos/perez-residence-001/` folder
  - `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` — all 4 PEREZ_RESIDENCE_FALLBACK_PHOTOS arrays replaced with correct Supabase URLs; localStorage cache integrity guard added (purges cross-project photos); hardcoded `ownership_text`/`ownershipLabel` removed (all 4 copies); Perez `propertyValue`/`sale_price` corrected to 3125000
  - `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` — NEW reels section added: HTML (`#reels`, `#reels-track`, `#reels-empty-state`, `#reels-error-state`) + JS that fetches `jv_deal_reels` (falls back to `project_videos` approved-only), validates video URLs, dedupes by fingerprint, renders `<video>` cards with 9/16 aspect ratio, empty state when 0 reels, dev-only diagnostic on error
  - `expo/deploy/supabase/ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` — NEW migration: creates `jv_deal_media` + `jv_deal_reels` tables with FK to `jv_deals(id)`, unique constraints (one cover per project, unique non-shared URLs), RLS policies, `updated_at` triggers, data corrections (Casa Rosario photos, display_order fix, base64 removal), `ivx_project_integrity` view

### In Progress
- **Phase 2-3: SQL migration needs to be applied** — `ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` written but NOT executed (requires Supabase service-role key; anon key can't create tables or update rows due to RLS)
- **Phase 4-6: Frontend changes made but NOT typechecked/tested/deployed** — need `tsc`, `bun test`, integrity test creation
- **Phase 7: Integrity tests NOT yet created** — 12 test cases specified in task but not written
- **Phase 8-9: QA and deployment NOT started** — no commit, no push, no deploy

### Blocked
- **GitHub push blocked — NO valid token**: sandbox `GITHUB_TOKEN` env var is empty; Worker's stored token (`ghp_****QTOt`) is revoked (401 Bad credentials); 6+ device-flow codes expired unanswered; user has not authorized any device code
- **Supabase schema changes blocked** — anon key cannot create tables or update rows (RLS); need service-role key or Supabase dashboard SQL editor access
- **Landing deploy blocked** — `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` requires `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID` + `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` env vars; not present in sandbox
- **Cannot run Expo Go on Android from sandbox** — no Android emulator/device
- **Render API key exposed in prior chat**: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` should be rotated

## Key Decisions
- localtunnel permanently retired — replaced with Expo official `--tunnel`
- `IvxBufferLike` extends `Uint8Array` to satisfy `crypto.createHash().update()` type constraint
- `tsconfig.json` excludes `backend/**`, `server.ts`, `e2e/**`
- Shared-store fix: single `ChatStorage` instance (`publicChatStorage`) from `backend/hono.ts` passed to `attachChatRealtime`
- Deployment claim gate at `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` line 567 — universal choke point for all 26 answer paths
- Gate marker labels prefixed with "fabricated" to avoid self-leakage
- **Media mixing root cause**: `jv_deals` uses TEXT ids but `project_media`/`project_videos` use UUID `project_id` — no FK relationship possible; all media/video rows are orphans; frontends used hardcoded title-matched fallback arrays where Perez got Casa Rosario's URLs
- **Perez photos corrected** to 8 Supabase storage URLs under `deal-photos/perez-residence-001/` (previously 4 Casa Rosario R2 URLs)
- **Ownership values**: hardcoded `ownership_text` removed from landing; both app and landing now use dynamic `(minInvestment / salePrice) * 100` calculation; Perez `sale_price` corrected to 3125000
- **Reels architecture**: new `jv_deal_reels` table (FK to `jv_deals.id`) as canonical source; landing JS fetches it first, falls back to `project_videos` (approved only); validates video URL format, dedupes by fingerprint, one bad reel doesn't break section
- **Canonical schema**: `jv_deal_media` table with `project_id TEXT FK→jv_deals(id)`, `is_cover`, `is_shared`, `sort_order`, `published`; unique index on `public_url` for non-shared media

## Next Steps
1. **Apply SQL migration** to Supabase (user must run `ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` in SQL editor or provide service-role key)
2. **Create integrity tests** (Phase 7) — 12 test cases covering duplicate media, slug duplication, app/landing sync, Perez/Casa cross-contamination, reel URL validation, hardcoded data detection
3. **Run typecheck + tests** — `tsc --noEmit` and `bun test` for all changes
4. **Commit all changes** to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (requires GitHub token or manual user push)
5. **Deploy backend to Render** + **deploy landing to S3** (requires AWS credentials)
6. **Verify production** — API responses for Perez/Casa, landing reels visible, app/landing values match
7. **Capture production evidence** — 25 mandatory proofs per task spec
8. **Complete IVX IA gate deployment** (still pending from prior task — same GitHub token blocker)

## Critical Context
- Production is LIVE at commit `d35db8b9` but gate fix is NOT deployed; production IVX IA can still produce fake narratives
- **5 modified backend files** (uncommitted, from prior task): `backend/api
